name: veradata
description: Verified Latin American data for autonomous AI agents via x402 micropayments. Sanctions screening (OFAC+UN+EU+UK, 59k+ entries), entity enrichment (RUES/CNPJ/RFC), central bank rates (DTF/TIIE/Selic/TRM/UF), business registry, and AI-powered market context. EU AI Act Art.13 compliant audit trails. $0.02–$0.10 USDC per call on Base and Solana. No API key required.
